_comment: SAM.gov REST source config. Source-specific values live here, never in adapter code. QUOTA UPGRADE: when the SAM.gov role registration lands (1,000 req/day), change rate_limit.requests_per_day to 1000 (or set env GOA_REQUESTS_PER_DAY=1000 on the Cloud Run job — env wins) and optionally widen query_plan. Then re-run `python -m jobs.seed` to push this config into source_registry.
name: SAM.gov

query_plan._comment: Each keyword = 1 search = usually 1 request at limit=1000. Each NAICS code = 1 more search. Budget math: len(keywords)+len(naics) searches/run must fit inside requests_per_day - reserve_for_ui. At 10/day keep <=5 searches; at 1,000/day you can list every keyword and NAICS you want.
_naics_candidates_when_quota_raised: 238390 Other Building Finishing Contractors (toilet partitions install)

rate_limit._comment: requests_per_day is the SAM.gov quota for this key (free personal key = 10; registered system-account role = 1000). reserve_for_ui requests are held back from scheduled runs so reviewers can always click 'Pull full report' on the console. requests_per_second throttles pacing so bursts never trip the per-second limiter.
